# FreQtik public project reference

FreQtik is an independent creative-technology studio focused on audio software, producer knowledge, games and interactive experiments. The work is producer-led and AI-assisted. AI is used for implementation, research, debugging, iteration and communication, but the public claim is the finished result: it must be understandable, functional, documented and useful.

## Impulse Anvil
Impulse Anvil is a Windows 10/11 64-bit VST3 creative impulse-response designer. It is not positioned as a general-purpose convolution-reverb suite. Its focus is IR authoring: load two WAV impulse responses or source sounds into A and B, prepare each endpoint, morph them through time, frequency or stereo space, audition the result, and bake the designed result into a portable WAV IR.

The current public workflow includes endpoint preparation, time stretch, gain, Color processing, Texture Depth, visual EQ, waveform editing, wet preview, output processing, reusable WAV export, spatial morph modes and A-to-B Lerp. Morph approaches documented publicly are Time Morph, Spectral Morph, Spectral BandSwap, Spectral ZigZag, Stereo Slot Swap, Mid/Side Boundary and A-to-B Lerp. The product includes a free demo and paid license options.

## Master Desktop Tap
Master Desktop Tap is a free beta Windows VST3 routing utility. Inserted on a DAW master bus, it mirrors audio to a selected Windows output device so communication and capture software such as Discord, OBS or screen sharing can receive the mix without changing the DAW's ASIO driver. It has no built-in session timer and is intended as a routing utility, not a mastering processor.

## Contrast Rules for Producers
Contrast Rules for Producers is a free practical framework about how context, contrast, attention and timing affect perceived impact in arrangement, sound design and mixing. It is presented as a way of thinking rather than a secret-formula claim.

## Learning to Bear
Learning to Bear is a surreal single-player 3D puzzle-platformer released on Steam on May 1, 2025. It combines more than 40 handcrafted levels with wingsuit traversal, swinging, rail grinding, logic puzzles, ability progression and dreamlike mission spaces. FreQtik developed and published the game.

## Aim Trainer Bee Pro
Aim Trainer Bee Pro is a compact precision clicker released on Steam on May 4, 2025. It uses one-minute rounds, Steam leaderboards and performance feedback including accuracy, combos and click speed.

## Micro Mouse Star Trainer
Micro Mouse Star Trainer is a free browser-based precision trainer for mouse micro-control. It uses star layouts, ring drills, circle repetitions, depth movement, timing, accuracy and weakness-focused follow-up drills.

## Boon TD Online
Boon TD Online is a browser-playable tower-defense project developed from the earlier Warcraft III Boon TD concept. It includes progression, tower systems and ongoing milestone-based development.
